description: Rogue Frontier Patch 6 (23. April 2025) — Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.description: Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Combat balance changes for this patch can be found here

sections.heading: Fixes

subsections.heading: UI Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue where the first tab of the Guild Details UI could appear empty
Fixed issue where the 'Copied to clipboard' message would stay visible after closing the Guild Members UI
Fixed issue where the ‘For Sale’ tooltip would stick to the cursor after closing the minimap

subsections.searchable_text: UI Fixes Fixed issue where the first tab of the Guild Details UI could appear empty Fixed issue where the 'Copied to clipboard' message would stay visible after closing the Guild Members UI Fixed issue where the ‘For Sale’ tooltip would stick to the cursor after closing the minimap

subsections.heading: Other Fixes

items.text: Fixed issue preventing Warden Mastery Pack skins from being tradable on the Marketplace in Albion Europe

subsections.searchable_text: Other Fixes Fixed issue preventing Warden Mastery Pack skins from being tradable on the Marketplace in Albion Europe
